com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api

Class ExecutionServerFactory

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.ExecutionServerFactory

  • public class ExecutionServerFactory
extends java.lang.Object
    Create remote execution client and local execution server instances using interfaces. Following example binds the client callback handler to the given address and port
    ExecutionServerFactory factory = new ExecutionServerFactory();
    IExecutionServer client = factory.createClient(InetAddress.getByName(localAddress), localPort);
    Since:
    TTworkbench 15

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      ExecutionServerFactory()

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods Deprecated Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ICampaignExecution createCampaignClient(java.net.InetAddress bindAddress, int portNumber)
      Create a new camapign execution client binding to a certain IP address and port
      IExecutionServer createClient()
      Create a new execution client which starts local service handler on localhost and port IExecutionServer.DEFAULT_CLIENT_PORT_NUMBER.
      IExecutionServer createClient(java.net.InetAddress bindAddress, int portNumber)
      Deprecated. 
      use createClient()
      IExecutionBase createLocalServer()
      Deprecated. 
      please use instead createLocalServer(IExecutionHandler)
      IExecutionServer createLocalServer(IExecutionHandler handler)
      Create a local execution server in the same JVM.
      static void setServerFactory(ExecutionServerFactory serverFactory)
      Use method to define a new server factory.

      • ExecutionServerFactory

        public ExecutionServerFactory()

    • Method Detail

      • setServerFactory

        public static void setServerFactory(ExecutionServerFactory serverFactory)
        Use method to define a new server factory. No server can be created outside the eclipse context.
        Parameters:
        serverFactory - the new server factory

      • createLocalServer

        public IExecutionServer createLocalServer(IExecutionHandler handler)
                                   throws java.io.IOException
        Create a local execution server in the same JVM. Not implemented in the client API.
        Parameters:
        handler - the execution handler
        Returns:
        a new instance of a local execution server started in the same JVM.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - is thrown on initialization error

      • createLocalServer

        public IExecutionBase createLocalServer()
                                 throws java.io.IOException
        Deprecated. please use instead createLocalServer(IExecutionHandler)
        Create a local execution server in the same JVM. Not implemented in the client API.
        Returns:
        a new instance of a local execution server started in the same JVM.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - is thrown on initialization error

      • createClient

        public IExecutionServer createClient()
                              throws java.io.IOException
        Create a new execution client which starts local service handler on localhost and port IExecutionServer.DEFAULT_CLIENT_PORT_NUMBER.
        Returns:
        a new instance of a execution client
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - is thrown on initialization error
        See Also:
        for binding to a certain IP address and port

      • createClient

        @Deprecated
public IExecutionServer createClient(java.net.InetAddress bindAddress,
                                                 int portNumber)
                                          throws java.io.IOException
        Deprecated. use createClient()
        Create a new execution client binding to a certain IP address and port
        Parameters:
        bindAddress - no longer used
        portNumber - no longer used
        Returns:
        a new instance of an execution client
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - is thrown on initialization error

      • createCampaignClient

        public ICampaignExecution createCampaignClient(java.net.InetAddress bindAddress,
                                               int portNumber)
                                        throws java.io.IOException
        Create a new camapign execution client binding to a certain IP address and port
        Parameters:
        bindAddress - local service handler address (server connects back to it)
        portNumber - local service handler port number (server connects back to it)
        Returns:
        a new instance of an execution client
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - is thrown on initialization error
